steps.t: Make your way north to Ost Ringdyr and speak with Emissary Pip Diggins of Hoarhallow. He may have knowledge of the sapling that you discovered.
Make your way from Ost Ringdyr to Hoarhallow far to the south-west. There, find and speak with Marigold Winterdown, Ned Claybrick, and Emerald Twospad…
After speaking with the residents of Hoarhallow, it is clear that they have never seen a sapling like you have found. They have seen the vile huorns t…
